message:
Migrate HTTP/1 listener from thread-per-connection to async runtime spawn

- listener.rs: Replace std::thread::spawn with RuntimeHandle.try_spawn for
  connection handling, eliminating blocking thread-per-connection model;
  update run() signature to take RuntimeHandle reference; remove ThreadWaker
  helper and manual poll loop; add proper SpawnError handling; update doc
  examples and tests to use RuntimeBuilder
- ambient.rs: Remove obsolete AmbientFinding for server/connection.rs spawn
  call (now fixed by this refactor)

This change aligns HTTP/1 connection handling with the async runtime model,
reducing thread overhead and enabling proper cancellation integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

         exemption_reason: None,
